caption: In the video, a man in a dark suit and patterned tie stands in an office setting, addressing two seated individuals. The man appears to be speaking with a sense of authority or concern, as he gestures slightly with his hand. The person on the left, wearing a white shirt and tie, listens attentively, while the woman on the right, dressed in a black turtleneck, looks on with a serious expression. The background features a window with blinds and a computer monitor, suggesting a professional environment. The interaction seems to involve a discussion or briefing, possibly related to work matters.
